The '''''Sevari Cabal''''' was a [[Colony ship/Legends|colony ship]] sent of on an expedition in the very early days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The ship was lost, but it was later believed that its crew had in reality discovered [[Sevarcos II]] and settled the planet, their descendants being the [[Sevari]].
